summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of NBA 2K Legacy Vault - Proof of Demand & Upload features. All 23 backend API tests passed, all frontend features working correctly including admin panel with 7 tabs, file upload (multipart & base64), and Google Doc integration.

design_issues.issue: Missing aria-describedby for Dialog - accessibility warning only

seed_data_creation: Test proof items created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features fully tested: Admin login (A@070610), 7 admin tabs (Games, Clips, Proof, Content, Comments, Emails, Petition), Proof tab with Add Proof modal showing drag-drop and clipboard paste (Ctrl+V) support, Content tab with Google Doc URL and Button Text fields, /api/upload (multipart) and /api/upload/base64 (clipboard paste) endpoints, Landing page Google Doc button in Vault section displays correctly.
passed_tests: Proof Tab - Add Proof Button Opens Modal
Proof Modal - File Input Browse Functionality
Content Tab - Google Doc URL Field Present
Content Tab - Google Doc Button Text Field
Landing Page - Google Doc Button in Vault Section
Landing Page - Proofs Gallery Displays When Proofs Exist
